positioning.statement: FOR mid-career dental practice owners who are exhausted by the business side of dentistry but terrified of losing everything they built, WHO need a liquidity event, operational relief, and a path forward that does not require selling their soul to a corporate machine, SGA Dental Partners IS THE dental partnership platform THAT makes dentists better -- not just better supported -- through peer collaboration, world-class continuing education, and a three-vertical architecture spanning community dentistry to advanced implantology, UNLIKE corporate DSOs that standardize practices into interchangeable units, or management companies that charge fees without offering equity upside, WE are backed by the Thurston Group's 38-year, $4B+ track record across 8 dental and healthcare platforms -- and our partners keep their name, their team, and their way of practicing while owning equity in something far larger than any solo practice.
positioning.oneLiner: SGA is the dental partnership platform where dentists come to get better, not just get bought.
positioning.primaryMessage: Dentists come to SGA to get better, not just to get bought.

pillars.name: The Education Platform
pillars.message: The only dental partnership with a built-in path from general dentistry to advanced implantology.
proofPoints: Pikos Institute: world-renowned implantology training center, Dr. Michael A. Pikos as founding partner
4Front Symposium: annual peer learning event for partner clinicians
Individual Growth Engine: Dr. Cavendish story -- 20 years in practice, revenues up 16.5% TTM, staff retention at 100%
Dr. Grant Olson: 138K YouTube subscribers, 23M+ views, one of 300 CEREC Mentors worldwide
Career pathway: general dentist can upskill through Pikos Institute and develop implant capabilities within SGA

pillars.name: The Thurston Track Record
pillars.message: Backed by the only PE firm that has built this exact platform 8 times and returned $4B+ to partners over 38 years.
proofPoints: 38-year firm history (founded 1988)
$4B+ returned to partners across all platforms
8+ dental and healthcare platforms built
$350M credit facility secured for SGA expansion
Patrick J. Haynes III: founder and chairman, personally involved across all dental investments

pillars.name: Three Verticals, One Platform
pillars.message: Community dentistry. Collaborative general and specialty practice. Advanced implantology. Three pathways inside one partnership.
proofPoints: SGA original: 17+ practice groups across GA, MS, AL, LA, TN -- community dentistry
Gen4 model: national general and specialty footprint spanning AZ, CA, NV, MN, MI, TX
MODIS: implantology-focused vertical anchored by Pikos Institute and Innovative Dental (138K YouTube subscribers, 3,390+ reviews)
Career mobility: periodontist, general dentist, and pediatric practice all have a home inside SGA

pillars.name: Partnership That Preserves What You Built
pillars.message: Your name stays on the door. Your team stays in the chairs. Your patients never know the difference -- except that everything runs better.
proofPoints: 85% staff retention rate across the SGA network
Local brand preservation: every acquired practice retains its name, team, and community identity
JV equity model: partners retain ownership stake in the combined platform
Dr. Godat quote: 'SGA supports us and manages things behind the scenes. Our partnership allows us to focus on changing lives.'

pillars.name: The Peer Community
pillars.message: Solo practice is isolating. SGA is 100+ clinicians who challenge each other to think bigger.
proofPoints: Partner calls, clinical advisory board, cross-practice learning sessions
Dentists teaching dentists culture
The 'goose bumps' moment: senior clinicians brainstorming together
Dr. Ellingson: 'We are going to ask you to lead more. We are going to amplify your voice.'

differentiators.proof: Pikos Institute, 4Front Symposium, Individual Growth Engine -- competitors cannot replicate this education ecosystem overnight

differentiators.point: The Thurston Group's Serial Dental Platform Building
differentiators.proof: No other PE firm has this track record: 38 years, 8+ platforms, $4B+ returned. KKR backs Heartland but has no dental-specific narrative.
Community dentistry, collaborative general/specialty, and advanced implantology unified under one platform. No competitor offers this structural breadth.
Nobody tells the story of Year 2, 3, 5. Dr. Cavendish: bored after 20 years, joined Gen4, revenues up 16.5%, staff retention at 100%, 'it is fun again.'

archetype.description: SGA's deepest differentiator is knowledge -- the Pikos Institute, 4Front Symposium, peer mentorship. The Sage communicates wisdom and earned authority. The Caregiver provides the protective instinct: preserving names, teams, cultures. Not absorbing. Surrounding.

personality.doesNotSoundLike: We are the premier dental organization.

personality.soundsLike: You have been on your own long enough.
personality.doesNotSoundLike: We will take care of everything for you.

personality.soundsLike: Our partners can tell you how it worked out.
personality.doesNotSoundLike: We guarantee the best results in the industry.

personality.soundsLike: 7 out of 10 dentists regret their DSO sale. Here is why we built something different.
personality.doesNotSoundLike: We offer a superior partnership experience.

personality.soundsLike: Dentistry is the last great profession run by the people who do it. We intend to keep it that way.
personality.doesNotSoundLike: We are the fastest-growing DSO in America.

b2bHeadlines.headline: QuickBooks will never call you to the back office again.
b2bHeadlines.context: Lead generation ads, email subject lines

b2bHeadlines.headline: 7 out of 10 dentists regret their DSO sale. Here is what the other 3 did differently.
b2bHeadlines.context: Blog post, LinkedIn article, lead magnet

b2bHeadlines.headline: You built it. We protect it. They cannot say the same.
Decisions about your production should not be made by people wearing suits in a boardroom.
Dentistry is the last great profession run by the people who do it. Let us keep it that way.
b2bHeadlines.context: Conference keynote title, LinkedIn thought leadership

b2bHeadlines.headline: Your practice is your baby. We do not want to take it. We want to surround it.
b2bHeadlines.context: Sales deck, direct mail, landing page

b2cHeadlines.headline: If you have to think about your teeth, those moments are not there.
b2cHeadlines.context: Facebook ads, YouTube pre-roll, landing page hero

b2cHeadlines.headline: I was afraid to smile. Now I cannot stop.
His first meal with new teeth was a medium-rare New York strip.
b2cHeadlines.context: Facebook video ads, blog post, email

b2cHeadlines.headline: She spent 20 years caring for everyone else. Then she chose herself.
New teeth in one visit. 3,390 patients trusted Dr. O. Here is why.

dos: Lead with evidence, not claims. Names. Numbers. Verified outcomes.
Mirror the language dentists actually use: 'my practice,' 'my team,' 'my patients.'
Acknowledge DSO skepticism head-on before trying to counter it.
Tell the post-deal story -- what happens in Year 2, Year 3, Year 5.
Use Dr. Ellingson, Lamonte Jensen, Dr. Pikos, and Dr. Olson as human symbols of the brand.
Give the brand a first-class ticket: premium presentation, no discount language.
donts: Claim 'clinical autonomy' without immediately backing it with a specific example or named partner.
Use generic DSO language: 'world-class support,' 'premier dental organization,' 'we value our partners.'
Lead with the transaction before establishing the cultural fit.
Discount or run price promotions that signal 'not desirable at full price.'
Make promises you cannot substantiate with a phone call to a current partner.
Treat practice acquisition like a sales funnel. It is a trust funnel.

taglineOptions: Clinical freedom surrounded by the best of everything.
Built by dentists who refused to build another DSO.
The partnership that makes dentists better.
Your practice. Your name. Our platform behind it.
Where dentists come to get better, not just get bought.
Dentistry is the last great profession. We are keeping it that way.
They built DSOs for investors. We built one for dentists.
Not a DSO. A partnership of dentists invested in each other.
You built something worth protecting. So did we.

tiers.name: Community Practice Partnership
tiers.whatItFunds: 1-3 doctor practices, $1M-$3M revenue. 60-70% upfront liquidity + 30-40% retained equity in SGA platform + market-rate salary with 25-30% production bonus above threshold
tiers.recognition: Full operational takeover within 90 days. Practice name, team, and identity preserved. Technology investment for equipment upgrades.

tiers.name: Group Practice Partnership
tiers.whatItFunds: 4-10 doctor practices, $3M-$10M revenue. 55-65% upfront liquidity + 35-45% retained equity. Regional clinical director or advisory board position.
tiers.recognition: Leadership role in governance. Capital commitment for equipment upgrades within 12 months. Larger equity stake reflecting strategic value.

tiers.name: Specialty Practice Partnership (MODIS)
tiers.whatItFunds: Periodontist, oral surgeon, implantologist. 55-65% upfront + 35-45% equity in SGA/MODIS platform. $250K-$750K capital investment for infrastructure within 18 months.
tiers.recognition: Pikos Institute integration and clinical network access. Written scope protection guarantee. Dedicated recruiter for associate specialist hires.

tiers.name: Associate Clinical Growth Program
tiers.whatItFunds: Signing bonus ($15K-$30K), relocation assistance ($5K-$10K), full benefits from day 1 (401k through Voya, Cigna health, PTO), assigned clinical mentor, Pikos Institute access.
tiers.recognition: Class A shareholder eligibility from day one. Career pathing: Year 1-2 mentored growth, Year 2+ partnership pathway, Year 5+ full partnership potential.

pricing.guarantee: Clinical Independence Clause (written into partnership agreement), Brand Continuity Guarantee, Team Stability Commitment, Thurston Track Record as proof of long-term commitment

offerStack.coreOffer: Liquidity event (60-70% upfront) + SGA platform equity (30-40%) + full operational takeover (billing, payroll, HR, compliance, procurement, marketing, recruiting) + technology investment + contractual clinical autonomy

bonuses.name: 4Front Symposium Access
bonuses.description: Annual lifetime access to the peer learning event connecting partner clinicians. Solves the loneliness of solo ownership.

bonuses.name: Pikos Institute CE Pathway
bonuses.description: World-class implantology education. Solves clinical stagnation and 'falling behind' anxiety.

bonuses.name: Individual Growth Engine Enrollment
bonuses.description: 1:1 clinical mentorship. Solves the 'complacency trap' -- 20 years in, the work is not as fun as it used to be.

bonuses.name: Recruiting Infrastructure
bonuses.description: Dedicated recruiter with pipeline access across the SGA network. Solves the 18-month associate search nightmare.

bonuses.name: Benefits Upgrade for Staff
bonuses.description: Cigna health, Mutual of Omaha, 401(k) through Voya, PTO. Solves staff retention anxiety.

bonuses.name: Brand Preservation Guarantee
bonuses.description: Contractual commitment: your name stays on the door. Your team stays in the chairs. Solves identity loss fear.

guarantee.framing: Clinical Independence Clause, Brand Continuity Guarantee, Team Stability Commitment, Named References you can call. Not a money-back guarantee -- better: proof you can verify.

offerStack.urgency: Consolidation wave timing: practice valuations are strong NOW but market favors sellers who move while demand exceeds supply. Technology gap acceleration. Talent market tightening (76% find hygienist recruiting 'extremely challenging').

storyBrand.character: A mid-career dentist who built a thriving practice from nothing. They are proud, community-rooted, and fiercely protective of their name, their team, and the way they practice. They want financial security, operational relief, and a peer community -- without surrendering the identity they spent decades building.

problem.external: The business side of dentistry is crushing them. Payroll, HR, compliance, insurance claims, supply ordering, recruiting, technology upgrades -- they did not go to dental school for any of it.
problem.internal: Isolation and quiet fear. They feel like they are falling behind. Underneath the confidence, they are tired. They have started googling 'sell dental practice' at midnight and wondering whether the best years are behind them.
problem.philosophical: Dentists should not have to choose between clinical excellence and business survival. A career dedicated to patient care should not end in burnout.

guide.empathy: We know what it feels like to carry the weight of a practice alone. To spend Sunday nights fixing the schedule because your office manager quit. We built SGA because we refused to add to the regret statistics.
guide.authority: The Thurston Group: 38 years, 8+ dental and healthcare platforms, $4B+ returned to partners. 100+ partner practices across 10+ states. 85% staff retention rate. Pikos Institute. 4Front Symposium.

plan: Explore: Schedule a confidential conversation with our partnership team. No brokers, no pressure. We evaluate mutual fit -- not just financials, but culture, clinical philosophy, and vision.
Partner: Walk through a transparent, three-step evaluation. Receive an honest valuation. Structure a JV equity partnership where you retain ownership in the combined SGA platform.
Thrive: Keep your name, team, patients, and way of practicing. SGA handles billing, payroll, HR, compliance, procurement, marketing, and recruiting behind the scenes.

callToAction.transitional: Download the Practice Partnership Assessment -- a self-evaluation tool that helps practice owners determine whether they are ready for a partnership conversation.

storyBrand.failure: Burnout accelerates. Practice valuation declines without capital investment. Staff leaves for DSOs offering better benefits. Isolation deepens. The profession consolidates around them while their referral network shrinks.
storyBrand.success: Revenue growth through operational efficiency and technology investment. Financial security through diversified equity. Time reclaimed -- evenings and weekends belong to family. Rejuvenation: the spark comes back. Recognized as a clinical leader within a network of high-performing peers.
storyBrand.oneLiner: Most dentists who sell to a DSO end up frustrated and regretful. SGA is a partnership of dentists invested in each other -- backed by a PE firm that has done this 8 times and returned $4B+ to partners. You keep your name, your team, and your way of practicing.

beliefs: Dentist-led care: clinical decisions are made by clinicians, not by MBAs in boardrooms.
Continuous improvement: 'Improve 1% every day.' Excellence is a daily discipline built through peer collaboration.
Community roots: a dental practice is a community institution with a name and relationships that matter.
Clinical excellence through education: the Pikos Institute, 4Front Symposium, and Individual Growth Engine are the soul of the platform.
The long game: 38 years and counting. Building something that lasts, not flipping for a quick return.
insiderMarkers: 'Fourth Generation' -- a thesis, not just a name. Gen1 was accounting, Gen2 standardization, Gen3 fragmentation, Gen4 collaboration.
'Partnership of dentists invested in each other' -- double meaning: financially invested (equity) and personally invested (mentorship).
'Keep Smiling... it looks good on you' -- Dr. Olson's signature sign-off. The anti-corporate phrase.
'Get better, not just get bought' -- the primary brand message used by partners to explain their choice.
'Dentists teaching dentists' -- the cultural DNA phrase describing the mentorship model.
The Pikos Institute as a pilgrimage site and credential in the implant dentistry community.
4Front Symposium as the annual tribal gathering where 'goose bumps' happen.
sacredCows: Never rebrand acquired practices. 'Dental Partners of SW Georgia is still Dental Partners of SW Georgia. After 5 years. After 10 years.'
Never dictate clinical protocols from corporate. Full clinical autonomy protected by a CCO who is a practicing dentist.
Never treat the deal as the finish line. Tell the post-deal transformation story -- Year 2, Year 3, Year 5.
Never let non-clinicians lead clinicians. Dentists teach dentists. Clinical advisory board shapes policy.
Never flip and exit. Thurston's 38-year track record is patient capital, not quick-flip capital.
cultBranding.manifesto:
Dentistry is the last great profession still run by the people who do it.

Not administrators. Not algorithms. Not suits in a boardroom deciding how many minutes you get with a patient. Dentists. People who chose to spend four years learning to hold a handpiece and a lifetime learning to hold a conversation with someone afraid to sit in the chair.

That is worth protecting.

We have watched what happened to medicine. The doctors lost control. The administrators took over. The patient became a chart number. The craft became a factory. We are watching the same thing begin to happen to dentistry -- one corporate acquisition at a time, one production quota at a time, one dental practice losing its name and becoming Unit 47 in a national chain.

We refuse.

SGA Dental Partners exists because a Marine turned consultant, a practicing dentist who had seen both sides of the DSO coin, and a 38-year-old private equity firm with $4 billion in proven returns came together around one conviction: consolidation does not have to mean homogenization. Scale does not have to mean soullessness.

We built a platform where dentists teach dentists. Where a periodontist in Jacksonville can learn from Dr. Michael Pikos at the Pikos Institute. Where a general dentist in Phoenix can observe his first all-on-four with a mentor who makes complex cases fun again. Where an associate three years out of residency can invest as a Class A shareholder and build toward real ownership -- not a vague promise on a recruiting poster.

We built a platform where your name stays on the door. Where your team stays in the chairs. Where your patients never know the difference -- except that everything runs a little better and you come home a little earlier.

We are not a DSO. We are not playing by their rules. We are a partnership of dentists invested in each other -- clinically, financially, and personally.

Dentistry is the last great profession. And we intend to keep it that way.

Keep smiling. It looks good on you.
